streamChannelURL.description: Redis URL for SSE token streaming. Defaults to taskQueueURL when empty.

spendStoreURL.description: Redis URL for spend tracking. Defaults to taskQueueURL when empty.

redisURL.description: Redis URL for audit log. Required when sink is redis. No fallback.

webhookURL.description: Webhook URL for audit log. Required when sink is webhook.

retention.description: Audit event retention in Go duration format (e.g., 168h for 7 days).

maxStreamLen.description: MAXLEN ~ cap on the audit Redis stream per namespace. Default 100000.

maxDetailBytes.description: Max size for detail.input/output before truncation. 0 means unlimited.

redact.description: Glob patterns for field path redaction.

endpoint.description: OTLP collector endpoint. Leave empty to disable.
